---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: "[Question]"
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

## What is your question?
Describe what you would like to know.
> 💡 **Examples**
> - How do I enable this feature?
> - Is this compatible with another mod?
> - Is this behavior intended?

---
## Minecraft version
Example: 1.20.1

---
## Mod version
You can usually find this in the mod list or mod file name.

---
## Additional context (optional)
Add screenshots or other information if it helps explain your question.
